textByHashes.159e6d5f88ce673e8932c1097eee6c5b0c325371: That's right. I have kept a close eye on your progress. I'm impressed.
textByHashes.e9366db3e23f470223fe9eb853be3018c62cb949: The bandits? A mere nuisance, insignificant to my overall goal.
textByHashes.5357e1b80997d6557f4c800f94b718e7b66960c6: World domination! First Pollnivneach, then Al Kharid, then the whole of the desert!
textByHashes.92cf0e763b46d9bdb8e563638c69a55ced186566: You do understand who we are, don't you?
textByHashes.67631ae9cdb656b3a53d2346b8ece17581cad224: Silence! We are the descendants of assassins, the heirs of the revolutionaries who defeated the corrupt pharaoh and his brood!
textByHashes.7b2d2493322d46bff5b64debbe41fd4d09b60ef0: For centuries we have wandered the desert, rebuilding the empire we were promised!
textByHashes.26f6c5afc503b793f9aad28c49b69166d5c74b67: Will you join us in our quest to defeat the thralls of Tumeken and reclaim our birthright?
textByHashes.88537032e7327c0465a30caf58358ef1b6d07c0b: Be careful what you say! We are loyal servants of the Devourer!
textByHashes.113918863526ad39dff7ff5e6d233c6171a0ee35: Fool! You'll never get to me. Guards protect me.
textByHashes.b700b20c6fb592aafad8992403b9c10585143d44: You haven't seen the last of me!
